articles.title: Andhra Pradesh and Telangana school holiday today? How students can verify if institutions remain open safely
articles.summary: No official government holiday has been declared for schools or colleges in Andhra Pradesh or Telangana on July 24, 2026. However, several private institutions have suspended classes following a bandh called by student organisations.

articles.title: AIIMS releases NORCET 11 notification for Nursing Officer recruitment; applications open until August 13
articles.summary: AIIMS NORCET 11 Recruitment 2026: AIIMS New Delhi has released the NORCET-11 notification for Nursing Officer recruitment across participating AIIMS institutes. Online applications began on July 24, 2026, and will close on August 13, 2026.

articles.title: Osmania University declares UG CBCS May 2026 results for regular and backlog examinations; download here
articles.summary: Osmania University has declared the UG (CBCS) Regular and Backlog examination results for May 2026 for B.Com, B.A, B.Sc, BBA and B.Sc (Hons) programmes. Students can download provisional scorecards using their Hall Ticket Number through the official results portal.

articles.title: Ramayana Trailer Release Live Updates
articles.summary: Ranbir Kapoor made his Comic-Con debut as he took to the big stage at Ballroom 20 for the grand 'Ramayana' launch with co-star Yash, director Nitesh Tiwari and producer Namit Malhotra. The stars presented their film and got candid about their characters in the hour-long presentation.
